data.title: Dow Jones rises ahead of Fed minutes; Nvidia soars on Meta deal. Live coverage on stock market.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise in anticipation of the release of the Federal Reserve meeting minutes. Nvidia's stock saw a significant increase following the announcement of a deal with Meta. These events were highlighted in the latest coverage of the stock market today, showcasing positive movements in the market. The Dow Jones index performed well, while Nvidia showed particular strength due to its partnership with Meta. This positive momentum in the market was evident throughout the day, with investors closely monitoring these developments.

data.title: Recursion to reveal Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, hosting earnings call at 8:00 am ET.
data.description: The corporation will conduct a public earnings call on February 25th at 8:00 am Eastern Time, 6:00 am Mountain Time, and 1:00 pm Greenwich Mean Time.

data.title: eBay will report Q4 earnings on Feb. 18, analysts expect $1.35 EPS and $2.87 billion revenue. Annual dividend yield is 1.45%.
data.description: eBay Inc, trading as NASDAQ: EBAY, is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, Feb. 18. Analysts are predicting a quarterly profit of $1.35 per share, an increase from $1.25 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for eBay's quarterly revenue stands at $2.87 billion compared to $2.58 billion a year ago. UBS analyst Stephen Ju has maintained a Neutral rating on eBay and adjusted the price target from $95 to $93. The company currently offers investors an annual dividend yield of 1.45%, equivalent to 29 cents per share on a quarterly basis ($1.16 annually). This news has sparked interest among investors looking to capitalize on eBay's dividend yield. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Occidental Petroleum to report Q4 earnings on Feb. 18. Analysts predict 18 cents/share, revenue at $5.62B. OxyChem sold to Berkshire Hathaway. Stock fell 0.3% to $45.94.
data.description: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE: OXY) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, Feb. 18. Analysts are predicting earnings of 18 cents per share for the Houston-based company, a decline from the 80 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The projected revenue for the quarter is $5.62 billion, lower than the $6.84 billion recorded a year ago. Occidental recently finalized the sale of its chemical business, OxyChem, to Berkshire Hathaway. The company's shares closed at $45.94, dropping by 0.3% on Tuesday. For further details, interested parties can refer to Benzinga Pro, where they can find the latest analyst ratings and other relevant information.

data.title: Bath & Body Works will report Q4 and fiscal 2025 results on March 4, 2026. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.CEO and CFO to discuss.
data.description: Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE: BBWI), based in Columbus, Ohio, has revealed its schedule to release the financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal 2025. This announcement was made on February 18, 2026. The disclosure is set to occur before the market opens on Wednesday, March 4, 2026. Following the release, a conference call is planned for 8:30 a.m. ET the same day featuring key executives Daniel Heaf, CEO, and Eva Boratto, CFO. The call will include a discussion on the results and a business update. Interested parties can access supplementary materials on the events and presentations page on the Investors section of the company's website at bbwinc.com, about 90 minutes before the conference call begins.

data.title: Zeo Energy partners with Creekstone Energy to develop 280 MW of baseload power for Utah AI data center.
data.description: Zeo is advancing towards providing behind-the-meter power for the expanding AI and data center industry through their long-lasting energy storage solutions. This move is aimed at catering to the energy needs of the burgeoning AI and data center sector, which is currently experiencing significant growth. Zeo's innovative energy storage solutions are poised to meet the increasing demand for reliable power supply in these industries.

data.title: Hawkins, Inc. (Nasdaq: HWKN) to participate in Raymond James & Associates’ Annual Institutional Investor Conference on March 3rd-4th, 2026 in Orlando.
data.description: Roseville-based company Hawkins, Inc. revealed that their CEO, Patrick Hawkins, and CFO, Jeff Oldenkamp, are scheduled to take part in Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3rd and 4th, 2026 in Orlando, Florida. Hawkins, Inc., a leading player in water treatment and specialty ingredients, operates on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol HWKN. This event is set to bring together key industry figures for strategic discussions on the  future landscape of the market.

data.title: KULR and Hylio partner to make U.S.-built unmanned agricultural drones with Texas-manufactured battery systems.
data.description: KULR has partnered with Hylio, a Texas company specialized in creating cutting-edge unmanned agricultural drones, in a Joint Development Collaboration.

data.title: Promising results: Moleculin MIRACLE Trial shows 40% preliminary CRc rate out of 30 participants.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This rate decrease represents over 200,000 people finding employment. Moreover, there has been a significant increase in job creation with over 300,000 new jobs added to the economy in the past month. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the labor market and a potential boost to the overall economy. The report also highlighted a decrease in jobless claims by 10% compared to the previous quarter. This data suggests a promising outlook for the country's workforce and economic growth.

data.title: Latin Metals and Latin Explore have finalized spin-out plan, moving Para and Auquis projects to Latin Explore for growth.
data.description: Latin Metals has successfully completed its spin-out plan, allowing it to advance its projects Para and Auquis into Latin Explore. This strategic move will enable Latin Explore to concentrate on drill-driven growth. The selection of these projects is based on their potential to deliver substantial results in exploration efforts. The spin-out plan aims to streamline operations and facilitate focused development, with Latin Explore positioning itself for efficient and effective advancement in areas of high mineral potential. This transition sets the stage for accelerated progress, with Para and Auquis playing pivotal roles in achieving significant milestones. Latin Metals will now shift its primary focus to other projects in its portfolio, capitalizing on this restructuring to enhance overall productivity and drive value creation.

data.title: DG Matrix secures $60M Series A funding led by Engine Ventures to advance solid-state transformer solutions for AI and electrification.
data.description: A company based in Morrisville, NC, DG Matrix, known for its solid-state transformer solutions, has recently concluded a successful Series A funding round, raising a total of $60 million. The funding round was oversubscribed and led by Engine Ventures, with contributions from Helios Climate Ventures, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Ltd., Fine Structure Ventures, MCJ, and Sabanci Climate Ventures. Notably, all existing investors, such as ABB, a prominent global technology leader in electrification and automation, also reinvested in this round.

data.title: Stratasys introduces dental anatomical model preset for simulation-based training, making education more realistic and accessible.
data.description: Stratasys, a leading provider of 3D printing solutions, has unveiled a new dental anatomical model preset aimed at enhancing simulation-based training. This innovative 3D-printed solution is tailored for dental schools, training centers, and medical device manufacturers, facilitating more realistic and standardized hands-on education. The cost-efficient nature of this offering increases accessibility by reducing complexity and overcoming ethical quandaries associated with conventional training methods. The initiative is part of Stratasys' commitment to revolutionize educational practices in the dental sector.

data.title: Marshall Community Credit Union chooses Mahalo Banking for digital enhancement, improving online and mobile channels.
data.description: A credit union based in Troy, Michigan, Marshall Community Credit Union, has chosen Mahalo Banking's platform to provide a better digital experience through online and mobile channels. This decision aims to improve services for customers and enhance their banking experience.
